## RFC PR Checklist

- [ ] I have copied `0000-template.md` to `rfcs/0000-<slug>.md` (leave the `0000`; maintainer will assign a number on merge)
- [ ] My file name is in kebab-case
- [ ] I have filled in all sections except `RFC PR` and `Tracking Issue`
- [ ] I have signed off the commit (`git commit -s`)
- [ ] I understand that the RFC may be accepted, rejected, or postponed
